admin.title: Labelling queue
admin.subtitle: {{total}} diagnostics flagged for review.
admin.empty: No diagnostics flagged for review. Nice work.
admin.llm_gold_empty: No LLM-confirmed diagnoses to review yet. Try the Flagged tab.
admin.coverage_subtitle: {{total}} LLM-fallback diagnoses in the last {{days}} days
admin.coverage_empty: No LLM-fallback diagnoses in this window.
landing.title: BharatAgriLens
landing.subtitle: Detect plant infections, get tailored remedies, and ask follow-up questions in your language.
landing.feature_1_body: Take a photo of any affected leaf or stem. Get the likely cause in seconds.
landing.feature_2_body: CIBRC-aligned treatment plans, written for Indian crops and conditions.
landing.feature_3_body: Diagnose and chat in 10 Indian languages. Voice input included.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email or mobile number to receive a one-time code.
login.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
disclaimer.title: Before we begin
disclaimer.body_ai: BharatAgriLens uses AI to suggest diagnoses and remedies. Always confirm critical treatment decisions with a local agronomist or KVK officer.
disclaimer.body_pii: We do not share your personal information with any third party. Images and queries are processed only to give you results.
onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Tell us a little about your farm so we can personalise your diagnoses and tips.
onboarding.welcome_point_1_body: We tailor advice to your region's climate and pests.
onboarding.welcome_point_2_body: Diagnoses focus on the crops you actually grow.
onboarding.location_subtitle: We use this to suggest weather alerts and regional treatments.
onboarding.location_help: Your information is encrypted on our servers.
onboarding.farm_subtitle: These details help us give you better recommendations.
onboarding.done_subtitle: We've saved your details. Let's check your first plant.
onboarding.done_edit_hint: You can update this anytime from your profile.
home.ready_prompt: Ready to check your crops today?
home.recent_empty: No diagnoses yet. Start your first scan.
home.weather_humidity_high: High humidity expected over the next few days. Stay alert for fungal infections.
home.tip_morning_spray: Spray pesticides in the cool morning hours, never in midday sun.
scan.title: Scan plant
scan.hint: Take a clear photo of the affected leaf, stem, or fruit.
scan.preview_hint: Make sure the affected area is in focus and well lit.
result.beta_warning_body: Our AI is still learning. Always confirm important treatment decisions with a local agronomist, KVK officer, or trusted neighbour before acting.
result.followups_subtitle: Tap any question to continue in chat
rejection.tip_lighting: Take the photo in daylight, no flash
rejection.tip_close: Get close — fill the frame with the affected leaf or stem
rejection.tip_focus: Hold steady so the photo is sharp, not blurry
rejection.tip_single_plant: One plant at a time, against a plain background
rejection.too_blurry.title: The photo is too blurry
rejection.too_blurry.body: We can't make out the details. Hold the camera steady and retake — daylight helps.
rejection.too_blurry.body_with_hint: We can't make out the details. Hold the camera steady and retake — daylight helps.
rejection.too_dark.title: The lighting isn't right
rejection.too_dark.body: The photo is too dark or too bright to analyse. Move into open daylight and try again.
rejection.too_dark.body_with_hint: The photo is too dark or too bright to analyse. Move into open daylight and try again.
rejection.too_small.title: The photo is too small
rejection.too_small.body: Use a larger photo. Tap the camera button and take a fresh picture instead of cropping a small one.
rejection.too_small.body_with_hint: Use a larger photo. Tap the camera button and take a fresh picture instead of cropping a small one.
rejection.not_a_plant.title: We couldn't find a plant
rejection.not_a_plant.body: This doesn't look like a plant we can diagnose. Point the camera at a leaf, stem, or fruit and try again.
rejection.not_a_plant.body_with_hint: This looks like a {{hint}} rather than a crop. Point the camera at a leaf, stem, or fruit and try again.
rejection.non_target_plant.title: Plant outside our coverage
rejection.non_target_plant.body: We can diagnose common crops like tomato, potato, rice, wheat, cotton, and mango — but not this one yet.
rejection.non_target_plant.body_with_hin: This looks like a {{hint}}, which is outside our coverage. We focus on common Indian crops (tomato, potato, rice, wheat, etc.).
rejection.low_confidence.title: We're not sure
rejection.low_confidence.body: The image isn't clear enough for us to be confident. Try a closer shot of the affected part in better light.
rejection.low_confidence.body_with_hint: The image isn't clear enough for us to be confident. Try a closer shot of the affected part in better light.
rejection.ambiguous.title: Two possibilities tied
rejection.ambiguous.body: Our model is torn between two diagnoses. A closer photo from a different angle would help us decide.
rejection.ambiguous.body_with_hint: Our model is torn between two diagnoses. A closer photo from a different angle would help us decide.
result.source_llm_tooltip: Our specialist model didn't recognise this crop, so we used a general-purpose AI to give you a best-effort diagnosis. Treat with extra caution and confirm with a local agronomist.
history.title: History
history.subtitle: Your past diagnoses and remedies
history.empty_subtitle: Once you scan a plant, you'll see the result here.
chat.title: AI assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask anything about your plants
chat.start_hint: Type a question or tap the mic to speak.
chat.suggested_q1: What is best for tomato fungal infection?
chat.suggested_q2: When should I spray neem oil?
chat.suggested_q3: How do I improve soil health?
chat.error_inference_down: Sorry, the assistant is offline right now. Please try again in a moment.
chat.error_generic: Something went wrong while sending your message. Please try again.
chat.stub_reply: (stub) Connect the inference service to enable real replies.
profile.title: Profile
settings.title: Settings
settings.notifications_diagnoses_hint: When an expert reviews your scan
settings.notifications_weather_hint: Heavy rain, heat waves, pest pressure
settings.notifications_daily_tip_hint: A short advisory at 7 AM, tailored to your crops
settings.privacy_share_data_hint: Help improve the model. No personal info is shared.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_subtitle: You're up to date. New alerts appear here.
notifications.diag_ready_body: Your {{plant}} scan from {{when}} was reviewed by {{reviewer}}.
notifications.weather_alert_body: Heavy rain expected tomorrow. Postpone any planned spray.
